- 优化媒体库设置，在未授予所有文件访问权限时会自动关闭并禁用相关功能
- 启用回收站后，会在首页顶部直接显示回收站入口，找回内容更方便
- 优化长按返回根目录的交互，移除突兀的按压反馈

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Improved media library settings by automatically turning off and disabling restricted features when all files access is unavailable
- Show the recycle bin entry directly in the home top bar after the recycle bin is enabled, making deleted items easier to restore
- Refined the long-press interaction for returning to the root folder by removing the distracting pressed highlight

</details>
